---
pagetitle: "Team — OpenPipeline"
title: "Team"
description: "The people building and maintaining OpenPipeline."
toc: false
page-layout: full
anchor-sections: false
listing:
  - id: authors
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: members.ejs
    sort: "title"
css: team.css
---

:::{#authors}
:::
